families.name: The Jacobs Family
families.theme: Repressed identity, toxic masculinity, cycles of neglect, infidelity

members.name: David Jacobs
members.notes: Same-gender oriented but deeply closeted. Abusive to Elaine.

members.name: Elaine Jacobs
members.notes: Meek. Unaware of David's orientation.

members.name: Nate Jacobs
members.notes: Bisexual, closeted. In love with Maggie, cheats with Cassie.

members.name: Jason Jacobs
members.notes: Married Needles. Sent kids to boarding school.

members.name: Needles Jacobs
members.notes: Drug user. Imprisoned.

members.name: Jett Jacobs
members.notes: Child of Jason and Needles. Sent to boarding school.

members.name: Joy Jacobs
members.notes: Child of Jason and Needles. Sent to boarding school.

members.name: Rut Montenegro
members.notes: Terrible parent. Abandoned David as a teen.

members.name: Kierston Montenegro
members.notes: Terrible parent. Co-owns restaurant in Ciudad Enamorada.

members.name: Emma Montenegro
members.notes: Became an adult actress to survive.

members.name: Liam Montenegro
members.notes: Became a stripper to survive.

members.name: Monica Lopez
members.notes: Had secret child with Rut.

members.name: Cesar Lopez
members.notes: Secret child of Rut and Monica. Does not know his father.

families.name: The Usher Family
families.theme: Hidden power, illuminati control, nepo babies, family as political apparatus

members.name: Annabelle Usher
members.notes: Famous ballerina. Secret Illuminati member. Controls family power.

members.name: Roderick Usher
members.notes: Secret agent, evil branch. Unaware his wife controls everything.

members.name: Frederick Usher
members.notes: Nepo baby. Suffers imposter syndrome.

members.name: Morella Usher
members.notes: Lawyer. Has feelings for Pedro.

members.name: Lenore Usher
members.notes: Righteous and pure-hearted.

members.name: Prospero Usher
members.notes: New money. Competes with the Landgraabs.

members.name: Pedro Usher
members.notes: Roderick's affair child. Morella has feelings for him.

families.name: The Faircroft & Ashcroft Families
families.theme: Inheritance betrayal, generational grudges, bigotry, found family, queer identity

members.name: Agustos Ashcroft
members.notes: Built agricultural empire with Isadora.

members.name: Isadora Ashcroft
members.notes: Co-founder of Ashcroft agricultural empire.

members.name: Beatrice Ashcroft
members.notes: Heir. Died in childbirth.

members.name: Edgar Ashcroft
members.notes: Felt cheated of inheritance.

members.name: Mirelle Ashcroft
members.notes: Edgar's wife.

members.name: Charles Faircroft
members.notes: Cheated on Beatrice throughout marriage. Brought mistress in after her death.

members.name: Velma Faircroft
members.notes: Charles' mistress turned wife.

members.name: Benedict Faircroft
members.notes: Son of Beatrice. Married Claire after her divorce from Lucien.

members.name: Lucien Faircroft
members.notes: Son of Charles and Velma. Drifter. Hates Benedict.

members.name: Claire Faircroft
members.notes: Was married to Lucien. Now married to Benedict.

members.name: Hazel Faircroft
members.notes: Daughter of Lucien and Claire.

members.name: Bella Faircroft
members.notes: Daughter of Benedict and Claire.

members.name: Bartholomew Faircroft
members.notes: Committed bigot. Homophobic and racist.

members.name: Sylvia Faircroft
members.notes: Had affairs with Dakota. Still has feelings for him.

members.name: Dakota Grayhawk
members.notes: Sylvia's affair partner. Father of Winona and Chayton.

members.name: Shepherd Faircroft
members.notes: Inherited father's bigotry.

members.name: Willa Faircroft
members.notes: Defers to Shepherd entirely.

members.name: Dorian Faircroft
members.notes: Gay. Estranged from parents. Married Simon.

members.name: Simon Faircroft
members.notes: Dorian's husband.

members.name: Sabrina Faircroft
members.notes: The HBIC. Entrepreneur. Connector of both families.

members.name: Winona Faircroft
members.notes: One with nature. Bisexual. Polyamorous.

members.name: Chayton Faircroft
members.notes: Married Fiona Ashcroft despite opposition.

members.name: Hawthorne Ashcroft
members.notes: Runs flower side of Ashcroft line.

members.name: Linnet Ashcroft
members.notes: Permissive parent.

members.name: Saffron Ashcroft
members.notes: Easygoing. Dislikes Faircrofts.

members.name: Emmet Ashcroft
members.notes: Saffron's husband.

members.name: Enzo Ashcroft
members.notes: Considerably older than Tourmaline. Runs jewellery business.

members.name: Tourmaline Ashcroft
members.notes: Fairy. Genuinely loves Enzo.

members.name: Fiona Ashcroft
members.notes: Married Chayton. Too lenient with children.

families.name: The Ridley Family
families.theme: Emotional incest, cycles of infidelity, motherhood under stress, teen social dynamics

members.name: Ethan Ridley
members.notes: Repeatedly cheats on Kamila. Deeply enmeshed with mother Ethel.

members.name: Kamila Ridley
members.notes: Once had potential to be world-class chef. Stressed by abusive mother-in-law.

members.name: Ethel Ridley
members.notes: Lost husband. Transferred dependence onto Ethan. Sees Kamila as a threat.

members.name: Johannah Ridley
members.notes: The golden girl. The reason this save was started.

members.name: Jodie Ridley
members.notes: Popular girl. Vain. Competing for Taehun with Regina.

members.name: Jade Ridley
members.notes: Goth rebel. Same-gender oriented. In love with Sloane Hayes.

members.name: Jonathan Ridley
members.notes: Youngest. Babied by Ethel. Wants to be an astronaut.

families.name: The Yoh Household
families.theme: Celebrity isolation, unreciprocated love, class dynamics

members.name: Nichole Yoh
members.notes: Mega-celebrity. Conceived Taehun via test tube.

members.name: Taehun Yoh
members.notes: Non-committal. Spoiled. Celebrity by association.

members.name: Alfred Kvasnicka
members.notes: Butler and best friend to Nichole. Father figure to Taehun.

members.name: Victoria MacAllister
members.notes: Maid. Homewrecker. Ethan Ridley's affair partner.

members.name: Nadia MacAllister
members.notes: Twin maid. Neglected twin. In love with Genos.

members.name: Genos Carvelli
members.notes: Gardener. Loves Nichole. Nichole unsure of her feelings.

families.name: The Bhatnagar, Mehra & Chaudhary Families
families.theme: Family loyalty, animal care, tradition vs independence, domestic abuse

members.name: Parivita Bhatnagar
members.notes: Animal-loving. Runs vet clinic and animal shelter.

members.name: Rajiv Bhatnagar
members.notes: Playful and easy-going.

members.name: Priya Bhatnagar
members.notes: Trad wife. Disapproves of Shalini's independence.

members.name: Meera Bhatnagar
members.notes: Looks up to Shalini. Already influenced by her.

members.name: Karanveer Chaudhary
members.notes: Physically abusive husband and bad father.

members.name: Sajan Chaudhary
members.notes: Mixologist. Diminishes herself for Karanveer.

members.name: Madhav Chaudhary
members.notes: Future comedian. Best friends with Cedric Addams.

members.name: Gulab Chaudhary
members.notes: Child of Karanveer and Sajan.

members.name: Madhuri Chaudhary
members.notes: Child of Karanveer and Sajan.

members.name: Kirti Chaudhary
members.notes: Child of Karanveer and Sajan.

members.name: Shalini Mehra
members.notes: Fashion designer. Roommates with Alessia.

members.name: Alessia Moretti
members.notes: Aspiring actress. Roommates with Shalini.

families.name: The Addams Family
families.theme: Loving, strange, deeply close. All can see ghosts.

members.name: Gomez Addams
members.notes: Patriarch.

members.name: Morticia Addams
members.notes: Witch.

members.name: Cedric Addams
members.notes: Made specifically to marry Johannah Ridley. Capable and skilled.

members.name: Wednesday Addams
members.notes: As she appears in the TV show.

members.name: Eudora Addams
members.notes: Witch.

members.name: Ophelia Frump
members.notes: Morticia's sister. Witch. Close with Aconite Foxglove.

members.name: Lurch
members.notes: Zombie butler. Close with all Addams family members.

families.name: The Kovac Siblings
families.theme: Succubus siblings. Opposition to exploitation, activism, temptation.

members.name: Natasha Kovac
members.notes: Eldest. Succubus and DOM. Opposes Kason's trafficking.

members.name: Isolde Kovac
members.notes: Hippie activist. Falls in love with Johnny Zest.

members.name: Yuri Kovac
members.notes: Youngest. Tempter of all men. Pleasant and non-committal.

families.name: The Rollins & Freeman Families
families.theme: Working class ambition, gang life, family loyalty vs lifestyle

members.name: Darius Rollins
members.notes: Soul food chef. Owes bank money. Working toward his own restaurant.

members.name: Shayla Rollins
members.notes: Educated and supportive of Darius.

members.name: Javante Rollins
members.notes: Going astray. Drawn to gang life. Loves painting.

members.name: Latoya Freeman
members.notes: In La Cosa Simstra. Has a crush on Johnny Zest.

members.name: Elias Freeman
members.notes: In La Cosa Simstra. On-off thing with Celeste Mugford.

members.name: Deshawn Freeman
members.notes: In La Cosa Simstra. Wants to come out to other gang members.

members.name: Vallis Delacroix
members.notes: Terrible partner. Abandoned by Arielle.

members.name: Arielle Peloquin
members.notes: Left Vallis. Remarried Linville. Abandoned daughter Brielle.

members.name: Linville Peloquin
members.notes: Arielle's new husband. Does not know about Brielle.

members.name: Brielle Delacroix
members.notes: Abandoned by mother. Became a sugar baby to escape. Plans to seduce Linville as revenge.

families.name: The Moanikea Household
families.theme: Sulani dreams, identity, love across species

members.name: Oliana Moanikea
members.notes: Mermaid. Wants to become human for Kaleo. Runs restaurant in Sulani.

members.name: Moana Moanikea
members.notes: Grandmother. Provides guidance and support.

members.name: Malia Nohau
members.notes: Best friend. Human who wants to become mermaid for Kaiolohia.

members.name: Kaleo Mistshore
members.notes: Oliana's crush.

members.name: Kaiolohia Nalu
members.notes: Malia's crush.
